description: HTML source code for a web-based database viewer interface, including embedded CSS and JavaScript for dynamic functionality, such as database and table selection, data display, and UI interactions.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches list of databases and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases by re-fetching data.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the list of tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables within the selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads and renders data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Constructs HTML to display table data in an interactive format.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual cell content, handling objects and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for better readability.
